task: Launch-quality advanced task: Radome Rain Detuning Compensation Table. Reality context: a remote terminal loses link availability during heavy rain after a radome material change. Embedded packet: metric map: metric1=rain_rate_mm_h, metric2=gain_loss_dB, metric3=beam_shift_deg, metric4=link_margin_dB; records: R1 rain_rate_mm_h=51.73 gain_loss_dB=833413 beam_shift_deg=57.5 link_margin_dB=23.5; R2 rain_rate_mm_h=17.23 gain_loss_dB=455913 beam_shift_deg=27.5 link_margin_dB=15.3; R3 rain_rate_mm_h=59.45 gain_loss_dB=696001 beam_shift_deg=42.5 link_margin_dB=6.1; R4 rain_rate_mm_h=38.79 gain_loss_dB=695096 beam_shift_deg=19.1 link_margin_dB=20.4; limit_rain_rate_mm_h=9.94; limit_gain_loss_dB=393992; limit_beam_shift_deg=18.5; decision_budget_usd=272500; sensitivity_shift_pct=5; hard_threshold_record_count=1; removed_context="benchmark framing favored long-horizon professional work with concrete verification". Rules and constraints: Fit a simple linear or monotone relationship from the embedded rows only; flag records whose residual exceeds the supplied tolerance or reverses expected direction. Options or recommendations cannot use external measurements, specialized licensed software, or hidden assumptions; all calculations must use only the embedded packet, and any contradictory or under-supported record must be marked needs_review. Required work: produce compensation and availability decision; convert the packet into an auditable evidence table, cite the governing values, and list unresolved assumptions. Deliver radome_rain_compensation.csv + field_note.md with formulas or executable logic, record-level citations, validation checks, sensitivity notes, and a final recommendation table suitable for expert review.
